text:
There once was a lad named Timmy who lived on an island without any phones. He was quite lonely. One day, a mysterious ship sailed into port. A sailor waved wildly.

"Hello!" cried Timmy. "Are you guys lost?"

"Yes!" replied the sailor. "And we need your help!"

Timmy looked out to sea. "What's happening?"

The sailors explained that a whale had come ashore and was crushing everything in sight!

"I've got just the thing!" said one sailor. "It's my grandma's old umbrella!"

They waved the umbrella, which sucked up water like a vacuum cleaner. The whale coughed up a whale rib and fled to the ocean.

Timmy danced around like nobody else. That evening, his grandma handed him a shiny object. "'Here's a map to Atlantis.'"

"There must be nothing there!" lamented Timmy.

"Not a thing? Hmm..." His grandma winked.


On map day, he found Atlantis.

Timmy learned
